MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-22-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Stephen M. Fuerch, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff.
Order to Show Cause to Plaintiff in Propria Persona for failure to appear at Pre-Arbitration on 1/22/2007 is heard this day. Court ordered OSC off calendar and dissolved/good cause. Proceedings reported by: Laura E. Martinez, CSR# 11332. (212)

Notice Of Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories And Defts' Request For Production Of Documents
Off Calendar Feb-06-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant Lauren Schindel's Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories and Requests For Production Of Documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Plaintiff is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $512.50, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. = COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

PRE-ARBITRATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-29-2007 Continued To Feb-22-07 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 212

Off Calendar Dec-21-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTS LAUREN SCHINDEL and MARK SCHINDEL'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO INTERROGATORIES is off calendar, to be re-noticed in the Discovery department. (301/PJB) JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: NICHOLE RODICH, CSR# 11604
